text: As I stand in this brightly-lit, modern interior, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The large glass wall acts as a transparent barrier between my current reality and a vibrant, mysterious space beyond—a place dedicated to research and development. The geometric arrangements and clean lines evoke order, precision, and potential. I’m aware of the human drive to innovate and explore; walking toward the colorful exhibit, I feel both small in the face of collective knowledge and inspired by our capacity for ingenuity.
